snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Vault and note storage pathless reveal safety review
reviewers.independence: Independent security and UI Design reviews examined the exact frozen hash, canonical lease/config resolution, pathless contracts, successor fences, body-free failure, one Settings owner and focus behavior; both returned CLEAR without edits.

dimensions.summary: Existing API, Data, Settings and UI owners locate storage reveal and its residual without a new document, setting, page or prototype surface.
Owners agree on typed pathless results, canonical active-vault/config authority, unavailable external-root truth, segment/identity fencing, fixed failure and final shell-syscall residual.
Four exact selectors project only PIGE-VAULT-005 and partial E1.04; semantic lock v3 has 1,204 claims and every Requirement, Exit and phase status remains unchanged.
Development gets exact schema, IPC, service and UI selectors for canonical reveal, strict preload projection, successor rejection, localized status, duplicate guard and focus restoration.
No Markdown file or decision is added; relevant owner deduplication and semantic-neutral manifest compression keep every leanness budget green.

verification.evidence: The exact 17-path Development plus governed bind passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate test, package and distribution evidence
verification.evidence: Focused 4/61, impacted 10/203 and full 107/1,244 pass with typecheck, build, development Electron, unified Agent and exact macOS package/distribution evidence.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The candidate retains 57 dependency records with zero waivers; CON-001 through CON-004 and semantic lock v3/1,204 pass with no Requirement, Exit or phase status drift.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 56 Markdown files, 3,466 entry words, 3,928 trace lines, 249,992 trace bytes and 1,212,971 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: Vault and note storage reveal safety
coordination.compatibility: This candidate adds pathless storage reveal actions without changing layout, dependencies, settings storage, permission policy, product scope or statuses.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze 17 paths at the supplied exact hashes; security and UI Design returned CLEAR. Product Planning bound existing Owners, PIGE-VAULT-005/E1.04 evidence, semantics and this recipe without changing Development bytes.

nonBlockingRisks: The final checked-path-to-shell.openPath syscall TOCTOU remains a platform primitive residual.
External source-root binding setup and move workflows remain open; unavailable bindings only report not connected and fail closed.
